hyperedges.label: graph-core layering: repository -> metadata -> schema -> query -> storage
Domain extension point mechanism (subclass, register, define schema, compose)
Storage layer: the only layer permitted to import nebula3-python

nodes.label: graph-core: a domain-agnostic Graph Data Layer over NebulaGraph.
nodes.norm_label: graph-core: a domain-agnostic graph data layer over nebulagraph.

nodes.label: GraphClient: the single public entry point for graph-core consumers.  Wires Grap
